easyReadonly.title: easy-readonly
easyReadonly.description: Make T readonly. So, make mapped type readonly.
easyReadonly.hint: Mapped type: [K in keyof T]. Set modifiers, such as infer, before brackets.

mediumNonNullable.title: MyNonNullable
mediumNonNullable.description: Write Conditional Type that removes null and undefined from T.
mediumNonNullable.hint: Conditional Type: T extends null | undefined ? never : T

mediumReturntype.title: MyReturnType
mediumReturntype.description: Write a type that extracts the return type of function `T` (infer).
mediumReturntype.hint: infer R allows you to "capture" the type in a conditional expression. It follows the pattern (...:[]) => R

hardReadonlyPartial.title: ReadonlyPartial
hardReadonlyPartial.description: Create a type that makes all properties of object T both readonly and optional.
hardReadonlyPartial.hint: Both modifiers can be applied together: readonly [K in keyof T]?
